# Short drive line (endpoint BEFORE the graph edge that it crosses).
# The splice vertex must still land on the vertical edge at x≈180.3.

polygon outer
0,0
300,0
300,200
0,200
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

drive-line
50,100
130,100
----
drive-line: 50,100 -> 130,100

generate
----
total_stalls: 86

graph vertices
----
vertices: 16
  0: (27.910, 27.910)
  1: (272.090, 27.910)
  2: (272.090, 172.090)
  3: (27.910, 172.090)
  4: (223.279, 27.910)
  5: (223.279, 172.090)
  6: (167.459, 27.910)
  7: (167.459, 172.090)
  8: (111.640, 27.910)
  9: (111.640, 172.090)
  10: (55.820, 27.910)
  11: (55.820, 172.090)
  12: (27.910, 100)
  13: (55.820, 100)
  14: (111.640, 100)
  15: (167.459, 100)

snapshot
----
